description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular receiver with a dark brown metallic finish and visible mechanical detailing, including bolts and mounting plates. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending from the receiver and supported by a pair of metallic rods, with a black muzzle device at the end. The rifle's body includes two prominent cylindrical components, likely representing a drum or rotary magazine and a secondary mechanical housing. The grip and stock area are compact and integrated into the main body, with no visible traditional buttstock. The overall design is industrial and utilitarian, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy surfaces. The color palette is dominated by dark brown, black, and metallic gray, giving it a rugged, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, industrial-style rifle with a long barrel, dark brown metallic body, and prominent cylindrical components. The design is compact, with a black muzzle device and integrated mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular muzzle device and the twin cylindrical components beneath the barrel, highlighting the rifle's mechanical complexity.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the mounting plates on the receiver, and the alignment of the cylindrical magazine and housing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the receiver and the end of the barrel, with the cylindrical components partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the mechanical detailing on the receiver and the arrangement of the cylindrical magazine and housing.
